news.title:
Waaree Energies to meet analysts/investors on Mar 24, 2026, via virtual seminar.
Discussions will use only public data; no unpublished price-sensitive info shared.
news.summary:
Waaree Energies to meet analysts/investors on Mar 24, 2026, via virtual seminar.
Discussions will use only public data; no unpublished price-sensitive info shared.

news.title:
India mandates locally made solar ingots, wafers by 2028 to reduce Chinese imports.
Tata Power, Waaree Energies plan investments as India targets 500 GW non-fossil fuel power by 2030.
news.summary:
India mandates locally made solar ingots, wafers by 2028 to reduce Chinese imports.
Tata Power, Waaree Energies plan investments as India targets 500 GW non-fossil fuel power by 2030.

news.title:
Waaree Energies faces arbitration by Enel Green Power over a Jan 2025 share purchase dispute.
Case filed at ICC London; financial impact is uncertain as the company contests claims.
news.summary:
Waaree Energies faces arbitration by Enel Green Power over a Jan 2025 share purchase dispute.
Case filed at ICC London; financial impact is uncertain as the company contests claims.

news.title:
Waaree Energies starts building a 10 GW ingot-wafer plant in Nagpur, investing ₹6,200 crore.
The 300-acre facility aims to cut import reliance and create 8,000 jobs, boosting the economy.
news.summary:
Waaree Energies starts building a 10 GW ingot-wafer plant in Nagpur, investing ₹6,200 crore.
The 300-acre facility aims to cut import reliance and create 8,000 jobs, boosting the economy.

news.title:
Waaree Solar Americas to acquire 53.7M Series B shares of USH for $30M.
Transaction independent from promoters, subject to customary closing conditions.
news.summary:
Waaree Solar Americas to acquire 53.7M Series B shares of USH for $30M.
Transaction independent from promoters, subject to customary closing conditions.

news.title:
Waaree Energies schedules analyst/investor meet on March 9, 2026, in Mumbai.
Discussions will use publicly available info; no sensitive data will be disclosed.
news.summary:
Waaree Energies schedules analyst/investor meet on March 9, 2026, in Mumbai.
Discussions will use publicly available info; no sensitive data will be disclosed.

news.title: Waaree Energies rebounds strongly from intraday lows, gaining over 2%.
news.summary: Waaree Energies rebounds strongly from intraday lows, gaining over 2%.

news.title:
US imposes preliminary CVD on Indian solar cells/modules, affecting exporters.
Indian exporters, including Waaree and Vikram Solar, may legally challenge the order amid pending investigations.
news.summary:
US imposes preliminary CVD on Indian solar cells/modules, affecting exporters.
Indian exporters, including Waaree and Vikram Solar, may legally challenge the order amid pending investigations.

news.title: Waaree Energies clarifies US 126 countervailing duty on solar products isn't applicable.
news.summary: Waaree Energies clarifies US 126 countervailing duty on solar products isn't applicable.

news.title:
Waaree Energies reassures no impact from 126% US tariffs on earnings.
Analysts retain ratings as Waaree avoids tariffs by sourcing non-Indian solar cells.
news.summary:
Waaree Energies reassures no impact from 126% US tariffs on earnings.
Analysts retain ratings as Waaree avoids tariffs by sourcing non-Indian solar cells.

news.title:
Waaree Energies' management states new duty won't impact operations.
Management highlights confidence in their business model despite regulatory changes.
news.summary:
Waaree Energies' management states new duty won't impact operations.
Management highlights confidence in their business model despite regulatory changes.

news.title:
Waaree Energies shares face scrutiny after US imposes 126% import duty on Indian solar products.
Premier shares are also impacted by the US import duty action on solar products.
news.summary:
Waaree Energies shares face scrutiny after US imposes 126% import duty on Indian solar products.
Premier shares are also impacted by the US import duty action on solar products.

news.title:
US imposes 126% tariff on Indian solar imports, citing unfair subsidies harming American manufacturers, impacting trade flows.
Waaree Energies' Hitesh Doshi clarified duties target Indian-made solar cells, limiting panel exports impact; 4% US imports use Indian cells.
news.summary:
US imposes 126% tariff on Indian solar imports, citing unfair subsidies harming American manufacturers, impacting trade flows.
Waaree Energies' Hitesh Doshi clarified duties target Indian-made solar cells, limiting panel exports impact; 4% US imports use Indian cells.

news.title:
Waaree Energies' unit, Waaree Forever, won a 300MW wind project in Dwarka.
The project includes a 25-year PPA with Solar Energy Corporation of India.
news.summary:
Waaree Energies' unit, Waaree Forever, won a 300MW wind project in Dwarka.
The project includes a 25-year PPA with Solar Energy Corporation of India.

news.title:
Waaree Energies Ltd received a 500MW solar module supply order from a domestic solar power developer.
The order, to be fulfilled in FY 2026-27, involves no promoter interest or related party transactions.
news.summary:
Waaree Energies Ltd received a 500MW solar module supply order from a domestic solar power developer.
The order, to be fulfilled in FY 2026-27, involves no promoter interest or related party transactions.

news.title:
Waaree Energies signs deal for 2.5 MW electrolyzer service with ZFI.
It joins an MOU to supply 50 MW electrolyzers for India's green hydrogen goals.
news.summary:
Waaree Energies signs deal for 2.5 MW electrolyzer service with ZFI.
It joins an MOU to supply 50 MW electrolyzers for India's green hydrogen goals.

news.title: Waaree Energies is in talks with Andhra Pradesh and other states for a greenfield manufacturing facility.
news.summary: Waaree Energies is in talks with Andhra Pradesh and other states for a greenfield manufacturing facility.

news.title:
Waaree Energies shares fell 2.98% to Rs 2875.7 on BSE amid talks for a Rs 8,175 crore greenfield factory.
The new facility aims to increase lithium-ion cell production from 3.5 GWh to 20 GWh and expand other capacities.
news.summary:
Waaree Energies shares fell 2.98% to Rs 2875.7 on BSE amid talks for a Rs 8,175 crore greenfield factory.
The new facility aims to increase lithium-ion cell production from 3.5 GWh to 20 GWh and expand other capacities.

news.title:
Indian solar firms plan ₹30,000 crore investment for 50 GW solar cell capacity by FY27.
Key players include Waaree Energies, Adani Solar, Reliance, ReNew Energy, and Avaada Group.
news.summary:
Indian solar firms plan ₹30,000 crore investment for 50 GW solar cell capacity by FY27.
